titleStmt.title: SII 16.265: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 265. (A.R. No. 415 of 1915.) ENAMADALA, NARASAROWPET TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the Madanagōpālasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1487, Krōdhana, Āśvayuja śu. 1[1], corresponding to 1565 A.D., October 5, (Friday).

It registers a gift of land in the village of Yanamadala in Vinukoṇḍa-sīma to Jakkula Koṇḍayya of the village by Daḷavāyi Veṅkaṭēśa, the agent of Kumāra-Veṅkaṭarājayya-mahārāju for the merit of his overlord. The donor is stated to have obtained Vinikoṇḍa-sīma from Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Tirumalarājayyadēva-mahārāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1487 Agu
nēṁṭi krōdhana saṁvvatsara Āśvīja śu 11 lu
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivadēvamahārāyalu vi
dyānagaramaṁdu ratnaśiṁhvāsanārūḍhuḍai pṛ
dhivisāṁmrājyamu śēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu . śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍalēśvara veṁkkaṭēśvaruni kumāraveṁkkaṭa
rājayya mahārājayavāri kāryaka¨rttalaina da
ḷuvāyi veṁkkaṭēśuniṁgāru yanamadala jakkula
koṁḍayaku yiccina bhūdānadha¨rmaśāsanamu . śrīma
nmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara rāmarāju tirumalarājayyadēva
mahārājayyavāru veṁkaṭrājayyavāriki pāliṁ
ci yiva navadhariṁcina vinikoṁḍasīmalōni yanamada
la grāmānanu baccēpalli polimēravaṁkkama
kṣētramu
kumāra veṁkkaṭa
rājayya vārikinni puṇyamugānu trivācakamugānu trikara
ṇa śudhigānu yistimi . ganaka Ā kṣētraṁlōnu paṁḍḍē nānā dhānyā
lunnu mī putrapautrapāraṁpparyamu Ācaṁdrāka sdhāyi
Anubhaviṁcci bratukuvāru . svadattāṁ vyā yō
harēti dharā ṣaṣṭiva ṣa sahasrāṇi yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . nva
dattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ
dattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 16.265 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
